name: Composio
longDescription: Use hosted Composio app tools for direct SaaS reads and actions across services such as GitHub, Gmail, Google Calendar, Slack, Notion, and Linear. When local files, scripts, pipelines, or reproducible automation matter, the bundled skill can use the local Composio CLI instead. Composio manages authentication and tool discovery on both surfaces and prevents automatic cross-surface replay of uncertain writes.
starterPrompts: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
releaseNotes: Initial app-plus-skills submission. Combines the hosted MCP-backed Composio app with a surface-aware skill and an optional local CLI path for files, scripts, pipelines, and reproducible automation.
